title: The Colosseum Pressure Builds
description: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Momonosuke, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14 as dressrosa’s toys and forgotten people reveal that Doflamingo’s rule has erased lives, memories, and families from the country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This toy is broken!! It's got "human disease"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: No, that's not it, just listen,'s Esther!! It's me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Get off me!! This is creepy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What's wrong all of a sudden!? We were getting along just fine until now...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You mustn't be with that man!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: No waywoof! You're too heavy now, Woo-woof!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Hey, can you come over here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't worry, he's also a toy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And that woman's husband... my name is "Milo," not "Wangoco".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I don't have one. I'm not married. That's not all too uncommon, is it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Hey, soldier, what're you trying to show me here!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There are the for- gotten ones...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And those who have forgot- ten....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: One of the people dofla- Mingo brought with him 10 years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Was an ability user who turned us all into toys!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the morning, and I was

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Well, we can see the flower fields from here.

summary: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
